overview: A web-based symptom checker that guides users through a structured assessment — entering demographics, selecting symptoms, answering follow-up questions — and returns a prioritized list of possible conditions with triage recommendations.
features: Age and gender input with medical disclaimer acceptance
Symptom search with autocomplete and quick-add buttons
Interactive body diagram for region-based symptom filtering
Dynamic follow-up interview with progress tracking
Results page with ranked conditions, confidence scores, and triage levels
Start new assessment flow from results screen
